mapper.select: SELECT SYSNAME, PORT, UNIT, TMPER, RXCUR, RXMIN, RXMAX, RXAVE, TXCUR, TXMIN, TXMAX, TXAVE, OCRTIME FROM NIA.TB_PERFORMACE_MST WHERE OCRTIME > #{ocrtime}::TIMESTAMP ORDER BY OCRTIME DESC
SELECT TID, SYSNAME, PSU, MODEL, SID, SW_VER, SW_CHKSUM, SW_DATE, SW_TIME FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_MST
SELECT SYSNAME, PTPNAME, PORT_TYPE FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_PORT
SELECT SYSNAME, SLOT, P_UNIT, P_PORTS, ACT, STATE , DEGREE, RX_DEGREE, TX_DEGREE, AD_SIDE, CURRENT_UNIT , CURRENT_PORTS, PAIR_SLOT, NET_TYPE FROM NIA.TB_EQUIP_SLOT
SELECT LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA_BAU, PTPNAMEA_PAU , SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ_BAU, PTPNAMEZ_PAU FROM NIA.TB_TOPOLOGY
SELECT LINK_ID, SYSNAMEA, PTPNAMEA, PTPNAMEA, SHELFA , SYSNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ, PTPNAMEZ, SHELFZ FROM NIA.TB_UNI_TOPOLOGY
SELECT TRUNK_ID, TRUNK_NAME, ROUTENUM, SYSNAME , UP_PTPNAME_BAU, UP_PTPNAME_PAU , DOWN_PTPNAME_BAU, DOWN_PTPNAME_PAU FROM NIA.TB_ROADM_TRUNK_REPEATER
